visual_description: A person lies motionless on muddy ground amid grass, then the scene shifts to a man in a dark suit standing in a temple illuminated by red lanterns and surrounded by offerings. He faces another man in a patterned shirt who laughs loudly, while a figure in a red jacket stands behind them.
audio_description: A man speaks in a conversational tone, followed by hearty laughter from the other man, with ambient temple sounds in the background.
